section1.title: Data Collection
section1.text1: We value your privacy. This website does
section1.text2: collect, store, or share any personal information (such as your name, email, or IP address) in a way that can identify you.

section2.title: Analytics
section2.text2: to understand how visitors interact with our site.

list.text1: This tool is cookieless. No cookies are stored on your device.
list.text2: All data is aggregated and anonymized. We cannot track your individual browsing behavior across other sites or identify who you are.
list.text3: We use this data solely to improve site performance and content.

section3.title: Third Parties
section3.text2: They may process basic technical logs (like request headers) to deliver the website to you securely, but this data is not used by us for tracking.
